headline: How The EMCOR Group (EME) Narrative Is Shifting With New Guidance And Analyst Targets
summary: EMCOR Group’s latest valuation work keeps model fair value essentially steady at US$869.29 per share, while published analyst price targets cluster in a wide US$814 to US$945 range. Those targets connect directly to research that cites stronger than expected Q4 revenue, confidence in U.S. Electrical, U.S. Mechanical, data center, and complex facilities work, and views on how much execution risk is now priced in. Read on to see how to interpret these moving targets and track what actually...

headline: EMCOR Group, Inc. Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
summary: NORWALK, Conn., April 02, 2026--EMCOR Group, Inc. (NYSE: EME) today announced that its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.40 per common share. The dividend will be paid on April 30, 2026 to stockholders of record as of April 16, 2026.
